description: Automatically propose collection actions when critical fields are unknown
trigger_condition: Any critical field in data_source has value 'unknown'

implementation.call_site: After data_source creation, before PreRunGate evaluation

pages.next_step: Configure pain_sources in configs/sources.yaml with valid URLs and APIs

seeds.impact: LOW - Can proceed with generic analysis

integration_points.decision_missing: Actions are added to decision_missing list for visibility
integration_points.progress_logging: Actions are logged to pipeline progress
integration_points.confidence_scoring: Unknown fields already penalize confidence score
